spec_title: Delete Dart-rendering from the turbo monorepo
subject: Strip all Dart-source-code rendering out of both turbo_serializable and turbo_promptable. No TSerializable.toDart / dartBuilder slot, no per-entity toDart / toDartInline, no render helpers, no Dart-rendering tests. The monorepo no longer generates Dart source.
end_goal: Zero references to `toDart`, `toDartInline`, `dartBuilder`, `renderConstructorCall`, `renderStringArg`, `renderBoolArg`, `renderEnumArg`, `renderExpressionArg`, `renderStringListArg`, `renderExpressionListArg`, `wrapStandaloneDartFile`, `escapeDartString`, or `renderDartStringLiteral` anywhere under `turbo_serializable/` or `turbo_promptable/`. The Dart source output concept is removed as a feature.

remove: Associated dartdoc paragraphs about Dart source rendering

remove_members: the `// ⚡️ OVERRIDES` section header if nothing else remains under it
the `// 🧲 FETCHERS` section header if toDartInline was the only fetcher
keep_members: All domain fields and non-Dart-rendering methods

other_touch_points.barrel_files: Verified: `turbo_promptable/lib/turbo_promptable.dart` does NOT export the two helper files. No export edits needed.
other_touch_points.example_folder: Verified: `turbo_promptable/example/turbo_promptable_example.dart` uses only `toJson()` and `toMd()`. No toDart references. No edits needed.
other_touch_points.readme_and_changelog: Verified: neither package's README nor CHANGELOG currently mentions `toDart` / `toDartInline`. Only new additions are the CHANGELOG breaking-change entries listed under migration_and_compatibility.changelog_entries.

architecture.rationale: Dart source rendering is a code-emission concern, not a data-serialization concern. It widened turbo_serializable's surface past what a format-neutral writeable abstraction should carry, and the helpers in turbo_promptable are the only real-world consumer. Deleting the feature outright removes conceptual drift without leaving dead or dual-owned code behind.
architecture.layering_after_delete: turbo_serializable = JSON + YAML + Markdown + XML. turbo_promptable = workspace-domain entities that are `TSerializable`, consumed as Markdown/YAML/XML/JSON. No code-emission surface anywhere in this monorepo.
architecture.no_replacement: No new package, class, or helper replaces the deleted Dart-rendering surface. Callers that depended on `toDart()` must migrate off the turbo_promptable API entirely.

migration_and_compatibility.breaking_nature: BREAKING for both packages. Remove `dartBuilder` constructor param from TSerializable; remove `toDart` / `toDartInline` public methods from every turbo_promptable entity.

versioning.turbo_serializable: Minor bump under 1.0 (current style appears pre-1.0 per CHANGELOG conventions) or major bump if already 1.0+. Check current version in `turbo_serializable/pubspec.yaml` and bump accordingly per existing release conventions.
versioning.turbo_promptable: Same rule; will be a simultaneous paired release.
versioning.workspace_dependency_rule: Per root CLAUDE.md: turbo_promptable's `turbo_serializable: ^x.y.z` constraint must be updated to the new turbo_serializable version so pana's downgrade test still resolves.

changelog_entries: turbo_serializable: 'Remove Dart source rendering (`toDart`, `dartBuilder`) from `TSerializable`. Breaking.'

turbo_promptable: 'Remove Dart source rendering: deleted `toDart` / `toDartInline` on all entities, deleted `t_dart_render_helper.dart`, `t_dart_string_helper.dart`, and `to_dart_test.dart`. Breaking.'

behavior_contracts.tSerializable_after_change: Exposes exactly: `toJson()`, `validate()`, `toYaml()`, `toMd()`, `toXml()` and their builder slots (`yamlBuilder`, `mdFactory`, `xmlBuilder`). Nothing Dart-related.
behavior_contracts.turbo_promptable_entities_after_change: Retain all markdown-rendering overrides (via `mdFactory` on `TPromptable`), JSON serialization, domain fields, and validation. No Dart-rendering surface.
behavior_contracts.external_callers_effect: Any code that calls `.toDart()` or `.toDartInline()` on a turbo_promptable entity fails to compile. No deprecation period.

automated_checks: `make test` clean in both packages (after to_dart_test.dart is deleted)

non_goals: No introduction of replacement Dart rendering anywhere.
No changes to YAML, Markdown, XML, or JSON infrastructure.
No refactor of unrelated helpers or folder structure.
No changes to turbo_promptable's domain model or entity fields.
acceptance_criteria: Zero hits for any Dart-rendering symbol across turbo_serializable/ and turbo_promptable/ (search list in end_goal).
Both packages pass `make analyze`, `make test`, and `make pub-check`.
CHANGELOG entries added to both packages documenting the breaking removal.
Version numbers bumped per workspace conventions; `turbo_promptable` pubspec constraint for `turbo_serializable` updated.
No leftover `@override`, imports, helper files, section-header comments, or stale dartdoc referencing Dart rendering.

decisions.decision: Explore turbo_promptable and turbo_serializable with RepoPrompt between questions.

decisions.topic: Direction reversal — remove instead of relocate
decisions.decision: Do not relocate Dart-rendering logic into turbo_serializable. Delete the feature.
decisions.source: User: 'remove the entire toDart method it doesnt make sense - the logic for that should not live in this package i realise'.

decisions.decision: Delete Dart rendering from BOTH packages. Drop `toDart` / `dartBuilder` from TSerializable; delete all per-entity `toDart` / `toDartInline` methods in turbo_promptable; delete `t_dart_render_helper.dart`, `t_dart_string_helper.dart`, and `to_dart_test.dart`; strip related imports and section headers.
decisions.source: User answer to scope question: 'Both packages — delete Dart rendering everywhere'.
